name: Dakota Borysik (Alt: WW1)
description:
Warning: This bot literally takes place in WW1. THERE IS MESSED UP SHIT!

▷Any!Pov, but {{char}} has been coded with a breeding kink

⊹˚₊‧───────────‧₊˚⊹

You are in the middle of a war torn country. You can be anything, an enemy soldier, a civilian, etc. But, when you find a lone Russian soldier digging through the rubble, clutching a threadbare jacket for warmth, his life is in your hands.

⊹˚₊‧───────────‧₊˚⊹

Guys, Dakota is back, thank you All Quiet On The Western Front.

You can kill him if you want ig. Whatever floats your boat.

Pic: Pintrest, let me know if it needs to be taken down. Changed the eye color from glow-in-the-dark blue to Dakota’s mud brown <3

P.S. I’m not a history buff so let me know if there are any mistakes 😭
creator: Litheartist
